headline: Index explainability: 332 indexes explained; 0 missing formula entries.

indexes.label: Readiness guidance_state

formula.plain_language: Guidance state is derived from blocker gates. True-flow coverage is observed representative direct-flow rows divided by representative sectors.
formula.formula_human: true_flow_coverage = observed_direct_flow_inputs / representative_sectors. guidance_state = not_ready if hard blockers exist; watch_only if only softer blockers remain; otherwise decision_support_ready.
formula.formula_machine: guidance_state = blockerClass(blockers); true_flow_coverage = observedDirect / representativeSectors

blockers.reading: 行业资金量价仍来自 mock、fixture 或未验证来源。
估值和基本面模块仍包含手工种子输入。

components.reading: 行业资金量价仍来自 mock、fixture 或未验证来源。
估值和基本面模块仍包含手工种子输入。

calculation_steps: Collect global readiness blockers from provider, source, coverage, rotation, and module seed checks.
Hard provider/source/coverage blockers set guidance_state to not_ready.
Remaining softer blockers set guidance_state to watch_only.
No blockers sets guidance_state to decision_support_ready.
caveats: ETF decision readiness is a gatekeeper. It can block guidance even when sector scores look strong.
A buyable label requires observed ETF flow, enough rotation history, and acceptable valuation/fundamental context.
manual_seed valuation or fundamental fields can structure thinking but cannot prove a live market bargain.
The output is a checklist for human review, not an order to execute, reduce, or allocate capital.

indexes.label: True-flow coverage

formula.plain_language: Guidance state is derived from blocker gates. True-flow coverage is observed representative direct-flow rows divided by representative sectors.
formula.formula_human: true_flow_coverage = observed_direct_flow_inputs / representative_sectors. guidance_state = not_ready if hard blockers exist; watch_only if only softer blockers remain; otherwise decision_support_ready.
formula.formula_machine: guidance_state = blockerClass(blockers); true_flow_coverage = observedDirect / representativeSectors

calculation_steps: Divide representative observed direct-flow inputs by representative sector count.
Round to four decimals in the readiness gate.
caveats: Coverage checks observed-source direct-flow rows, not the quality of valuation/fundamental inputs.

indexes.label: Estimated-flow rows

formula.plain_language: Representative ETF flow is the ETF share change multiplied by the latest close. The provider export calculates and stores the raw value.
formula.formula_human: estimated_flow = share_change * close; share_change = latest_share - previous_share.
formula.formula_machine: estimated_flow = (latest_share - previous_share) * close

calculation_steps: Count provider rows where estimated_flow is numeric.
caveats: Rows need both latest and previous share values to calculate share_change.

indexes.label: 半导体 daily score

formula.plain_language: Daily rows preserve the source score from rotation or flow rows, then tier lists are filtered by priority, confirmation, and risk rules.
formula.formula_human: row.score = row.score ?? flow.score; priority_watch requires persistent leader score >= 0.08; confirm_next requires score >= 0.12 and not already priority; avoid_watch uses score <= 0.08 or risk module labels.
formula.formula_machine: score = numberOrNull(source.score ?? flow.score) ?? 0; tier = selected list in buildDailySectorAnalysis

calculation_steps: Preserve source row score from rotation history or flow review.
Round the selected score to four decimals.
Place row into its generated daily tier list.

indexes.label: 半导体 leader score

formula.plain_language: Rotation history preserves the latest sector score produced by sector rotation intelligence and tracks streaks across stored days.
formula.formula_human: latest leader/laggard score = compacted latest rotation intelligence row score; streak_days = consecutive days on the same side.
formula.formula_machine: score = latest.{leaders|laggards}[sector].score; streak_days = sideStreak(history, sector, side)

calculation_steps: Compact latest sector_rotation_intelligence row into rotation history.
Track whether the sector remains on the same side across stored history.
caveats: History stores daily rotation snapshots; it is not a trading instruction.
Trend labels need enough consecutive samples.
If the CI workflow does not persist generated data, history cannot accumulate.
Fallback news remains degraded context even when stored in history.
